creator: natbsd@instinctive.eu
text:
Thanks Sevan for your review.

I was hoping for more discussion, so I could stand more confidently behind my proposed patch. As a result it is likely not optimal, but at least it is a proposition.

I added the option `-maproot=root`, removed the details of how to rebuilding the world, added a reference to the official archives as a primary mode of seeding the base filesystem, and hinted to the use of md_size for /var.

The patch is against the current head of `master` branch in freebsd-doc github repository [1], but hopefully this chapter is static enough to be easily merged.

[1]: https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/commit/3e755a3d2d7dff3dc3ada70588eff6953f52eb4c
